suggested_checks: Check a dedicated true-peak meter if this file will be encoded or limited.
Inspect the loudest passage for inter-sample peak behavior.
all_findings.title: Approximate true peak is above 0 dBTP
all_findings.why_it_matters: Samples reconstructed by downstream playback or encoding can exceed nominal full scale when true peak is above 0 dBTP.

suggested_checks: Inspect the frame RMS timeline alongside peak metrics.
Check whether this PLR matches the intended production style.
all_findings.title: Peak-to-loudness ratio is below 8 dB
all_findings.why_it_matters: PLR is the difference between true peak and integrated LUFS; lower values indicate less peak headroom relative to measured loudness.

suggested_checks: Inspect the stereo correlation plot around the low-correlation region.
Listen in mono around these regions if mono compatibility matters.
all_findings.title: Minimum L/R correlation is below 0
all_findings.why_it_matters: Negative L/R correlation can indicate phase-inverted content in at least part of the measured timeline.

suggested_checks: Inspect the stereo correlation timeline for persistent low-correlation sections.
Check whether the stereo presentation matches the intended playback context.
all_findings.title: Median L/R correlation is below 0.5
all_findings.why_it_matters: A lower median L/R correlation indicates less similarity between the left and right channels over the measured frames.

suggested_checks: Compare this measured loudness with the intended delivery context.
Check PLR and waveform/RMS plots for additional context.
all_findings.title: Integrated loudness is above -10 LUFS
all_findings.why_it_matters: Integrated LUFS is a whole-track loudness measurement; values above -10 LUFS indicate a high measured loudness for this file.

all_findings.evidence: 115 time range(s) have frame correlation below 0.3.
suggested_checks: Inspect the stereo correlation plot around these regions.
Listen in mono around these regions if mono compatibility matters.
all_findings.title: L/R correlation falls below 0.3 in some regions
all_findings.why_it_matters: Low L/R correlation marks regions where the two channels are less similar by this measurement.

suggested_checks: Inspect the mid/side energy plot and side-to-mid ratio panel.
Listen in mono around these regions if side-heavy sections matter.
all_findings.title: Median side-to-mid ratio is above -6 dB
all_findings.why_it_matters: A higher side-to-mid ratio means side-channel RMS is closer to mid-channel RMS in the measured frames.

all_findings.evidence: centroid_median_hz measured 2664.769 Hz; 12 time range(s) exceed the relative threshold.
suggested_checks: Inspect EQ, arrangement density, cymbals, distortion, or vocal presence in these regions.
Check whether these sections sound brighter or denser; centroid is only a proxy.
all_findings.title: Spectral centroid is elevated relative to this track's median
all_findings.why_it_matters: Spectral centroid is a frequency-distribution statistic; elevated regions indicate the centroid is higher than this track's median by the configured heuristic.

all_findings.evidence: centroid_median_hz measured 2664.769 Hz; 10 time range(s) fall below the relative threshold.
suggested_checks: Inspect EQ, arrangement density, instrumentation, or source changes in these regions.
Check whether these sections sound less high-frequency-weighted; centroid is only a proxy.
all_findings.title: Spectral centroid is reduced relative to this track's median
all_findings.why_it_matters: Spectral centroid is a frequency-distribution statistic; reduced regions indicate the centroid is lower than this track's median by the configured heuristic.

all_findings.evidence: Affected bands after duration and energy filters: air elevated, air reduced.

all_findings.why_it_matters: This groups broad frequency-band changes that crossed relative track-level thresholds.
